title: Peripheral Blood Sample Processing and RNA Extraction for qRT-PCR in NSCLC Patients
author: Bahareh Forouzani-Haghighi
materials: RevertAid First Strand cDNA Synthesis Kit
Maxima SYBR Green/ROX qPCR Master Mix
Extract total RNA using RNeasy Midi Kit (Qiagen, Cat# 74104) according to the manufacturer’s instructions. Elute RNA in 100 μL RNase-free water.
Synthesize cDNA from 1 μg of total RNA using RevertAid First Strand cDNA Synthesis Kit (Thermo Fisher, Cat# K1622) following the thermal profile: 65°C for 5 min, 42°C for 60 min, 70°C for 5 min.
Use beta-actin (ACTB) as the housekeeping gene.

steps.title: Collect 5 mL of peripheral blood...
steps.instruction: Collect 5 mL of peripheral blood in sterile EDTA-K2 tubes during routine follow-up visits.

steps.title: Keep samples at 4°C and process...
steps.instruction: Keep samples at 4°C and process within 2 hours to ensure RNA integrity.

steps.title: Perform leukocyte separation using Ficoll density...
steps.instruction: Perform leukocyte separation using Ficoll density gradient centrifugation: Layer blood diluted with PBS (1:1) over Ficoll in 15 mL conical tubes and centrifuge at 400 × g for 20 minutes at room temperature with brake off.

steps.title: Collect the buffy coat layer using...
steps.instruction: Collect the buffy coat layer using a sterile pipette and transfer to RNase-free tubes. Store immediately at −80°C until RNA extraction.

steps.title: Assess RNA quantity and purity using...
steps.instruction: Assess RNA quantity and purity using NanoDrop ND-1000 spectrophotometer by recording A260, A260/A280, and A260/A230 ratios.

steps.title: Evaluate RNA integrity by 1% agarose...
steps.instruction: Evaluate RNA integrity by 1% agarose gel electrophoresis in 1× TAE buffer stained with SYBR Green II RNA stain. Confirm presence of 28S and 18S bands.

steps.title: Perform qRT-PCR using LightCycler 96 system...
steps.instruction: Perform qRT-PCR using LightCycler 96 system (Roche) and Maxima SYBR Green/ROX qPCR Master Mix (Thermo Fisher, Cat# K0221).

steps.title: Include technical duplicates for each sample and non-template control (NTC)
steps.instruction: Include technical duplicates for each sample and non-template control (NTC).

steps.title: Calculate relative expression using 2 −ΔCT me thod
steps.instruction: Calculate relative expression using 2 −ΔCT me thod. Report normalized GRα and GRβ expression levels.
